title: docs: update for dual tinybird workspace (prod + staging)
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
After the staging-workspace split (#11128, #11135, #11140), several docs and skills still described the old single-workspace model. Updates 11 files to reflect the new architecture:

- `pollinations_enter` = prod traffic only
- `pollinations_enter_staging` = staging + dev + local-dev traffic
- Token-scoped routing per environment via `secrets/{prod,staging,dev}.vars.json`
- Pipes/datasources must be deployed to both workspaces (no CI auto-deploy yet)

### Critical (architecture facts)
- `enter.pollinations.ai/ENVIRONMENT-CONFIG.md` — Tinybird row in service matrix
- `.claude/skills/tinybird-deploy/SKILL.md` — workspace table, deploy-to-both flow, fix stale token path
- `apps/operation/economics/README.md` — clarify which workspace the dashboard reads

### High (skills that would query wrong workspace)
- `.claude/skills/spending-analysis/SKILL.md`
- `.claude/skills/abuse-detection/SKILL.md`
- `.claude/skills/model-debugging/SKILL.md`

### Medium (rotation + onboarding)
- `tools/scripts/rotation/README.md` — workspace-scoped token table
- `enter.pollinations.ai/.dev.vars.example` — local-dev points at staging WS
- `AGENTS.md` — Tinybird Deployment Safety section

### Low
- `.claude/skills/provider-billing/SKILL.md` — per-workspace billing TODO
- `tools/scripts/rotation/STATUS.md` — staging tokens not yet rotated by script

Addresses #11127

gist.headline: Two Birds, Two Nests
gist.blurb: Updated our internal docs and AI skills to support the new dual-workspace Tinybird setup. Production and staging traffic now have their own cozy, separate nests.
gist.summary: Updated documentation and internal Claude skills to reflect the new Tinybird dual-workspace architecture, separating production (pollinations_enter) from staging and dev traffic (pollinations_enter_staging).
gist.impact: Internal AI agents and developers will now correctly route queries and deployments to the appropriate Tinybird workspace based on their environment.
gist.visual_concept: Two birdhouses (Tinybird metaphor) being tended to by Polly the bee. One is for production, one for staging. Data flows into them separately.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny yellow hard hat, organizing glowing data streams into two separate wooden birdhouses. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'PROD' and 'STAGING' on the birdhouses. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
